title: Full-scale self-supervised maternal comorbidity phenotyping and cross-registry stress-testing in public birth records
description: Source code, manuscript source files, source-data tables, and selected model artifacts for a public birth-registry study of masked tabular self-supervised maternal comorbidity phenotyping, calibrated risk enrichment, linked infant death transfer analysis, and SINASC registry stress-testing. Individual-level CDC/NCHS and SINASC public-use records are not redistributed.
